questionHtml: Using the information in Figure 1, calculate the price elasticity of demand for capsicums when the price increases from NZ$18 per kg to NZ$24 per kg.
markschemeHtml:
Any valid working (correct %Δ Qd or %Δ P, provided the formula is not inverted) is sufficient for [1].

= –0.82 or 0.82 or 0.81(repeating) or 9/11

An answer of –0.82 or 0.82 or 0.81 without any valid working is sufficient for [1].

For full marks to be awarded, the response must provide valid working.

meta.title: Using the information in Figure 1, calculate the price elasticity of demand for capsicums when the price increases from NZ$18 per kg to NZ$24 per kg.
